mapper.select: SELECT COMMENT_SEQ AS commentSeq, BOARD_SEQ AS boardSeq, USER_SEQ AS userSeq, AUTHOR AS author, CONTENT AS content, PARENT_SEQ AS parentSeq, DEPTH AS depth, IS_DELETED AS deleted, DELETED_BY AS deletedBy, IS_SECRET AS secret, DATE_FORMAT(CREATED_AT, '%Y/%m/%d %H:%i') AS createdAt FROM TB_COMMENT WHERE BOARD_SEQ = #{boardSeq} ORDER BY COALESCE(PARENT_SEQ, COMMENT_SEQ), COMMENT_SEQ

SELECT COMMENT_SEQ AS commentSeq, BOARD_SEQ AS boardSeq, USER_SEQ AS userSeq, AUTHOR AS author, CONTENT AS content, PARENT_SEQ AS parentSeq, DEPTH AS depth, IS_DELETED AS deleted, DELETED_BY AS deletedBy, IS_SECRET AS secret, DATE_FORMAT(CREATED_AT, '%Y/%m/%d %H:%i') AS createdAt FROM TB_COMMENT WHERE COMMENT_SEQ = #{commentSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_COMMENT (BOARD_SEQ, USER_SEQ, AUTHOR, CONTENT, PARENT_SEQ, DEPTH, IS_SECRET) VALUES (#{boardSeq}, #{userSeq}, #{author}, #{content}, #{parentSeq}, #{depth}, #{secret})
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_COMMENT SET IS_DELETED = 1, DELETED_BY = #{deletedBy} WHERE COMMENT_SEQ = #{commentSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_COMMENT WHERE PARENT_SEQ = #{commentSeq}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_COMMENT WHERE BOARD_SEQ = #{boardSeq}
